pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade ModelMapper to 3.0.0 for compatibility with newer Java versions.
Upgrade Lombok to 1.18.30 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
Add Liquibase 4.25.0 for database migration management.
Add Apache Commons DBCP2 2.10.0 for connection pooling.
Add Apache Commons IO 2.15.1 for utility IO operations.
Add Spring Cloud 2023.0.0 BOM for cloud-native features.
Add Testcontainers 1.19.3 for integration testing.
Explicitly add JUnit 4.13.2 dependency.
Add Java Native Access 5.13.0.
Add Google Cloud Storage client 2.29.1.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin 0.8.11 for code coverage.
Add Maven Surefire plugin 3.2.2 for test execution.
Add Maven Checkstyle plugin 3.3.1 for code style enforcement.
Add Formatter Maven plugin 2.23.0 for code formatting.
Add SonarQube analysis properties for coverage and exclusions.
Define multi-module structure with core, dao, service, and service-api.
Set project packaging to pom to act as a parent aggregator.
Rename project name to 'Green City UBS'.
Remove legacy Springfox Swagger dependencies.
Remove old Google API Client dependency.
Remove explicit javax.validation dependency (now provided by Jakarta EE).
Remove direct starter dependencies from parent pom (moved to modules).

README.md.general_idea: Replaced the generic GitHub README template with specific documentation for the GreenCityUBS project.
README.md.human_impl: Removed placeholder text like 'Repository Title Goes Here' and added project description, contribution guidelines, and setup instructions.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the required Java version in the documentation to reflect the migration target.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'Java 11' to 'Java 21' in the 'Required to install' section.

README.md.general_idea: Updated the IntelliJ IDEA configuration instructions to use the new JDK version.
README.md.human_impl: Changed 'JRE : 11' to 'JRE : 21' in the setup steps.

README.md.general_idea: Added new environment variables required by the application to the documentation.
README.md.human_impl: Added variables like RABBITMQ_HOST, BUCKET_NAME, and GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to the properties list.

README.md.general_idea: Added detailed instructions on how to authenticate with Swagger UI using Bearer tokens.
README.md.human_impl: Added steps 3-6 in section 4.4 explaining token retrieval and authorization header setup.

README.md.general_idea: Added a new section documenting how to work with the Viber bot locally.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 4.3 with a link to a video tutorial.

README.md.general_idea: Added instructions on how to connect the backend with the frontend client.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 4.5 explaining cloning GreenCityClient and setting google.clientId.

README.md.general_idea: Added a dedicated section for setting up Checkstyle and SonarLint.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 5 with links to wiki and plugin pages.
